zh.lifeSummary: 當Einion Clud ap Madog於大約1100年出生在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾阿貝雷德福時，他的父親Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor60歲，母親Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales32歲。他和Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog至少有1個女兒。他去世於1177年在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Einion Clud ap Madog于大约1100年出生在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾阿貝雷德福时，他的父亲Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor60岁，母亲Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales32岁。他和Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog至少有1个女儿。他去世于1177年在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French Canadian: variant of   Madore  .

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname meaning ‘anvil’.

nameMeanings.name: Clud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: altered form of   Cloud  .
French: from an old vernacular form of the personal name   Claude  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Claude in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Klouda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Georg, Viktor.
Czech: from Kloud, a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Claudius (see Claud ).

variants.name: Cloud
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near an outcrop or hill, from Old English clūd ‘rock’ (only later used to denote vapor formations in the sky), or a habitational name from any of numerous places so named, such as Temple Cloud (Somerset), Cloud Bridge (Warwickshire), and Clouds Wood (Hertfordshire).

Native American: translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota and Dakota Sioux mahpiya, meaning ‘cloud’. Among the Sioux, several of their traditional personal names with this element were adopted as surnames (translated into English), e.g. Iron Cloud (see Ironcloud ) and Red Cloud (see Redcloud ).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hlodald, composed of the elements hlōd ‘famous, clear’ + wald ‘rule’, which was borne by a Christian saint and bishop of the 6th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Einion Clud ap Madog was born about 1100, in Aberedw, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, was 60 and his mother, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, was 32. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog. He died in 1177, in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.Aberedw, Radnorshire, Wales: Aberedw, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Einion Clud ap Madog est né environ 1100, à Aberedw, Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog. Il est décédé en 1177, à Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Einion Clud ap Madog um 1100 in Aberedw, Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor 60 und seine Mutter Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales 32. Er hatte mit Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Einion Clud ap Madog(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르 압레드w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Einion Clud ap Madog родился около 1100 г. в местности абиредв, радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, 32. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog. Он умер в 1177 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Einion Clud ap Madog nació aproximadamente 1100, en Aberedw, Radnorshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mrs. Einion Clud ap Madog. Murió en 1177, en Radnorshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
